PowerShell(Set-Location "C:\\Users\\maria\\company-employees-front"; git log --oneline -1; "--- status ---"; git status --short; "--- tracked count ---"; \(git ls-files | Measure-Object -Line\).Lines; "--- node_modules ignorado? ---"; git check-ignore node_modules dist)

PowerShell($ok=$false; for\($i=0;$i -lt 60;$i++\){ try { $h=Invoke-RestMethod -Uri "http://localhost:8080/actuator/health" -TimeoutSec 3; if\($h.status -eq "UP"\){ Write-Output "READY: $\($h.status\)"; $ok=$true; break } } catch { Start-Sleep -Seconds 2 } }; if\(-not $ok\){ Write-Output "NOT-READY-YET" })

PowerShell($ok=$false; for\($i=0;$i -lt 60;$i++\){ try { $h=Invoke-RestMethod -Uri "http://localhost:8081/actuator/health" -TimeoutSec 3; if\($h.status -eq "UP"\){ Write-Output "READY"; $ok=$true; break } } catch { Start-Sleep -Seconds 2 } }; if\(-not $ok\){ Write-Output "NOT-READY" })
PowerShell(Start-Process -FilePath "cmd.exe" -ArgumentList "/c cd /d C:\\Users\\maria\\company-employees && mvnw.cmd spring-boot:run" -WindowStyle Hidden -PassThru)

PowerShell($maxWait = 60; $waited = 0; do { Start-Sleep -Seconds 3; $waited += 3; try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:8080/actuator/health" -TimeoutSec 2 -ErrorAction Stop; Write-Host "UP after ${waited}s: $\($r.StatusCode\)"; break } catch { Write-Host "Waiting... ${waited}s" } } while \($waited -lt $maxWait\); if \($waited -ge $maxWait\) { Write-Host "TIMEOUT" })

PowerShell(netstat -ano | Select-String ":8080|:8443"; Start-Sleep -Seconds 5; try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:8080/actuator/health" -TimeoutSec 5 -ErrorAction Stop; "STATUS: $\($r.StatusCode\)"; $r.Content } catch { "FALLO: $\($_.Exception.Message\)" })
PowerShell(Get-Process -Name "java" -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object Id, ProcessName, CPU, @{N='Mem\(MB\)';E={[math]::Round\($_.WS/1MB,1\)}}, StartTime)

PowerShell($maxWait = 90; $waited = 0; do { Start-Sleep -Seconds 5; $waited += 5; try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:8080/actuator/health" -TimeoutSec 3 -ErrorAction Stop; "UP despues de ${waited}s: $\($r.StatusCode\)"; $r.Content; break } catch { Write-Host "Esperando... ${waited}s" } } while \($waited -lt $maxWait\); if \($waited -ge $maxWait\) { "TIMEOUT sin respuesta" })

PowerShell($maxWait = 120; $waited = 0; do { Start-Sleep -Seconds 5; $waited += 5; try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:8080/actuator/health" -TimeoutSec 3 -ErrorAction Stop; "UP en ${waited}s - HTTP $\($r.StatusCode\)"; $r.Content; break } catch { Write-Host "Esperando... ${waited}s" } } while \($waited -lt $maxWait\); if \($waited -ge $maxWait\) { "TIMEOUT" })
